sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n56372" key="kedre/laion" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κεδρ-έλαιον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n56372.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">oil of cedar</tr_>, extracted from cedar-resin, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg001:196" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.196</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
